title: Vanish Gold Oxi Action Stain Remover and Whitening Booster Powder, For Whites, Removes Tough Stains Even at 20°C, Restores Whiteness of Greyed Fabrics,Add a Scoop in Every Wash for Best Results, 470g
features: Removes odours from deep within clothing fibres
JUST ADD 1 SCOOP IN EVERY WASH for best results
Safe on everyday white fabrics like cotton and polyester
description: Product Description Boost your whites with new Vanish Gold Oxi Action Crystal White powder From coffee to wine stains, our new Oxi Action formula removes tough stains even in a cold 20°C wash Whites greying over time? Our multi-benefit formula RESTORES WHITES**, protecting fabrics from greying over time, whilst also removing odours from your wash JUST ADD 1 SCOOP IN EVERY WASH along with your detergent to make your Whites Whiter & Live Longer* Safe on everyday fabrics like cotton and polyester for use on white clothes like dresses or tops. Ingredients >30% Oxygen-Based Bleaching Agent, <5%: Anionic Surfactants, Non-ionic Surfactants, Zeolite, Enzymes, Optical Brighteners, Perfume, Citronellol, Hexyl Cinnamal Directions See pack for full dosage instructions. Usage Advice: Always follow washing instructions on garment or fabric care label. Check for colour fastness by testing a hidden area of the fabric. Rinse and allow to dry. For best results, it may be necessary to repeat parts of the process. Do not use on wool, silk or leather. Do not use on finished or coated surfaces - for example wood, metal, etc. Do not soak fabrics with metal fasteners or flame-resistant finishes. Do not expose pre-treated or soaked garments to sources of direct heat or direct sunlight before washing or rinsing thoroughly. Do not contaminate the product in the tub. Once mixed, do not leave solution in a sealed container. It will continue to give off oxygen and the container may build up pressure and may leak. Safety Warning Vanish Oxi Action Gold Powder. Contains: Sodium Carbonate Peroxide Causes serious eye damage Causes skin irritation Keep out of reach of children Do not get in eyes, on skin, or on clothing Wash hands thoroughly after handling Wear eye protection If in Eyes: Rinse cautiously with water for several minutes. Remove contact lenses, if present and easy to do. Continue rinsing. Immediately call a doctor If Swallowed: Call a doctor if you feel unwell. For sensitive skin, the use of gloves is recommended. Danger Manufacturer Contact Information Reckitt Benckiser, PO Box 4044, Slough, SL1 0NS, UK. See more
